title: Contact
description: A contact in Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM, representing an individual person associated with an account.

contactid.description: The unique identifier of the contact.

firstname.description: The first name of the contact.

lastname.description: The last name of the contact.

fullname.description: The full name of the contact.

jobtitle.description: The job title of the contact.

address1_line1.description: The first line of the primary address.

address1_city.description: The city of the primary address.

address1_stateorprovince.description: The state or province of the primary address.

address1_postalcode.description: The postal code of the primary address.

address1_country.description: The country of the primary address.

birthdate.description: The date of birth of the contact.

statecode.description: The state of the contact (0 = Active, 1 = Inactive).

createdon.description: The date and time the contact was created.

modifiedon.description: The date and time the contact was last modified.
